headline: Premium Construction & Interiors (Pvt) Ltd wins Best Design & Build Housing Construction Company
standfirst: Premium Construction & Interiors (Pvt) Ltd is recognised in the Global Business Excellence Awards previous winners archive for Best Design & Build Housing Construction Company, with source-backed context prepared for readers reviewing the award record.

content.text: Premium Construction & Interiors (Pvt) Ltd and the award record

Premium Construction & Interiors (Pvt) Ltd is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Best Design & Build Housing Construction Company. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Premium Construction & Interiors (Pvt) Ltd, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

Social and job sources corroborate Premium Construction & Interiors as a construction and interiors business. The GBE archive records the design and build housing construction award. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.
Why the Best Design & Build Housing Construction Company record matters

The Best Design & Build Housing Construction Company recognition places Premium Construction & Interiors (Pvt) Ltd in the GBE previous winners archive for 2025. For a prospective customer, partner, journalist, or award researcher, the practical value of this page is a clean public record: who received the award, what the award was called, and which source trail was reviewed before publication.
Award title: Best Design & Build Housing Construction Company.
Recipient profile reviewed against available source notes.

Source notes reviewed for this page include gbeaward.com, facebook.com, jobeka.lk, lk.linkedin.com. These references are used to confirm identity, business activity, programme identity, or award context. Where a source is a social profile, directory listing, booking platform, or press article rather than a recipient-owned website, the article keeps the claim narrow and avoids treating that source as proof of wider performance.
For the Best Design & Build Housing Construction Company page, that source trail anchors the story to the exact award record instead of a broad promotional profile.

Official site was not confirmed; keep article limited to GBE award and corroborated service category. This limitation matters because the site should not turn a winner listing into inflated SEO copy. It should help people discover the award record while keeping every visible claim defensible.
The Best Design & Build Housing Construction Company page therefore stays careful, useful, and defensible for readers checking the public record.

Premium Construction & Interiors (Pvt) Ltd's winner page will continue to be updated when stronger official sources, rights-cleared media, recipient statements, or ceremony materials are available. Until then, this page prioritises clarity, the official award wording, and source-backed context over generic promotional language.
Future updates to the Best Design & Build Housing Construction Company page can add deeper recipient context when stronger evidence is available.
